data.title: Those who won the Moore Thread lottery may see a floating profit of over 410,000 yuan per lot.
data.description: Today, Moore Threads' stock price surged 28.04% to close at 941.08 yuan per share, a new high since its listing, with a total market capitalization of 442.3 billion yuan. Compared to its initial public offering price of 114.28 yuan per share, Moore Threads' stock price has risen 723.49% in the past five trading days. If an investor had won a lottery for Moore Threads shares and held them until today's closing price, their unrealized profit per share would exceed 410,000 yuan. (Cailian Press)

data.title: BitMEX upgrades its mobile app, optimizing the UI and interaction mode.
data.description: Crypto derivatives exchange BitMEX today announced a major upgrade to its mobile application, introducing a redesigned interface and a brand-new interaction mode. This update provides a streamlined user experience, prioritizing instant responsiveness, simplified order processing, and improved access to key trading instruments. The upgraded BitMEX mobile application features a lighter, more focused user interface that highlights information hierarchy and reduces visual clutter. Traders can now use faster gesture-driven controls, including a "swipe to close" function, allowing users to close positions with a single gesture. The fast trading process has also been redesigned to help users reduce clicks and navigate the market more clearly. Additional feature enhancements include a simplified KYC process, one-click fiat-to-crypto purchases, and improved navigation for market and account operations via gesture controls. Users can access over 80 derivative contracts with low latency, as well as trading bots, copy trading, instant cryptocurrency purchases, and zero-fee cryptocurrency swaps.

data.title: U.S. Commerce Secretary Rutnick: Previously hoped the Federal Reserve would cut interest rates more significantly.
data.description: U.S. Commerce Secretary Rutnick stated that he had previously hoped the Federal Reserve would cut interest rates more significantly. (Jinshi)

data.title: a16z Crypto Annual Report: Decentralized Payment Systems May Be Widely Used by 2026
data.description: a16z Crypto released its annual report, covering multiple areas including stablecoins, tokenization, payments and finance, privacy, security, AI, and agents. a16z disclosed data showing that stablecoin trading volume reached $46 trillion in 2024, more than 20 times that of PayPal and nearly three times that of Visa. The report also mentioned the advancement of traditional asset tokenization, especially the integration of assets such as US stocks, commodities, and indices onto the blockchain through crypto technology. Furthermore, a16z projected the convergence of AI and crypto technology, predicting widespread adoption of decentralized payment systems by 2026.

data.title: Do Kwon will face court sentencing today and could face up to 12 years in prison.
data.description: Terraform Labs founder Do Kwon will be sentenced later today (December 11) in a Manhattan court by U.S. District Judge Paul Engelmayer. Prosecutors have reportedly requested a 12-year prison sentence for Kwon, citing factors including his guilty plea. At a hearing presided over by U.S. District Judge Paul Engelmayer for the Southern District of New York, Kwon pleaded guilty to two charges of conspiracy to commit fraud and wire fraud. In January, he pleaded not guilty to nine counts, including securities fraud, wire fraud, merchandise fraud, and money laundering. (Decrypt)

data.title: Coinbase plans to open access to Solana DEX
data.description: According to Coinbase protocol expert Andrew Allen, Coinbase is deepening its involvement in the Solana ecosystem, allowing users to trade native Solana tokens through decentralized exchange integration, rather than through traditional listings. Reportedly, Coinbase will open access to the Solana DEX, enabling users to trade any Solana ecosystem token through the DEX channel. Andrew Allen stated, "For issuers and developers, if your token has sufficient liquidity, it means that even without listing, you can be used by millions of users on Coinbase." (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Terraform Labs Founder Do Kwon Awaits Sentencing in Manhattan Court
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Terraform Labs founder Do Kwon is set to receive his sentence later today in a Manhattan court from U.S. District Judge Paul Engelmayer. Prosecutors have recommended a 12-year prison term, citing his guilty plea among other factors.

Previously, during a hearing overseen by Judge Engelmayer in the Southern District of New York, Do Kwon admitted guilt to charges of conspiracy to commit fraud and wire fraud. In January, he had pleaded not guilty to an indictment that included nine charges, such as securities fraud, wire fraud, commodities fraud, and money laundering.

data.title: Binance: US token airdrop will resume at 20:20.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance has announced that the Talus Network (US) token airdrop will resume at 20:20.

data.title: He Yi: Being a Binance editor is a high-risk profession; one is under investigation, and the other has been sent to jail.
data.description: When responding to a community question on the X platform about "how to become a Binance editor", He Yi said: "It's a high-risk profession. One person has been sent to jail, another is under investigation, and the person who hacked my WeChat is being pursued. There's no need for people to look for angles in official accounts or editors. I won't read these kinds of memes anymore."

data.title: Circle co-founder: Circle Gateway to be launched on Solana
data.description: At the Solana Breakpoint conference, Circle co-founder and CEO Jeremy Allaire stated that Circle will soon launch Circle Gateway on Solana, enabling cross-chain instant access to a unified USDC balance.

data.title: Reserve Rights has released a proposal to reform the token structure, suggesting the burning of approximately 30 billion RSR tokens.
data.description: Reserve Rights (RSR) has released a token structure reform proposal (RFC-1269) that proposes burning approximately 30 billion RSR tokens to reduce the total supply and introducing a governance-based veRSR issuance mechanism to enhance token holder participation and governance weight.

data.title: Keel has launched a $500 million investment plan aimed at attracting RWA projects to join the Solana network.
data.description: Keel, a capital allocation platform on the Sky ecosystem, announced a $500 million investment plan aimed at attracting real-world assets (RWAs) to the Solana network. The program, called the "Tokenization Regatta," was announced at the Solana Breakpoint conference in Abu Dhabi. It aims to attract tokenized asset issuers through a competitive process. Selected projects will receive direct funding and support for issuing risk-weighted assets (RWAs) such as debt, credit, or funds on the Solana platform. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Binance Futures to Delist AIAUSDT Perpetual Contract on December 11
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, Binance Futures is set to close all positions and conduct an automatic settlement on the USDⓈ-M AIAUSDT Perpetual Contract at 2025-12-11 12:15 (UTC). Following the settlement, the contract will be delisted. Users are advised to close any open positions before the delisting time to avoid automatic settlement. Starting from 2025-12-11 11:45 (UTC), users will not be able to open new positions for the specified contract.

During the final hour leading up to the scheduled settlement time, the Futures Insurance Fund will not be utilized to support the liquidation process for the futures contract. Any liquidation triggered during this period will be executed as a single Immediate or Cancel order (IOCO), which will be offloaded into the market in one attempt. If the IOCO execution leaves sufficient assets in the user's account to meet the required Maintenance Margin, the liquidation will cease. However, if the IOCO fails to fully reduce the position to satisfy Margin Maintenance requirements, any unfilled portion will be resolved through the Auto-Deleveraging (ADL) process. Users are strongly advised to monitor and manage open positions during this final hour due to potential heightened volatility and reduced liquidity.

To protect users and mitigate risks in extremely volatile market conditions, Binance Futures may implement additional protective measures for the contract without further notice. These measures could include adjusting maximum leverage, position value, and maintenance margin in each margin tier, updating funding rates, changing price index constituents, and using the Last Price Protected mechanism to update the Mark Price. Users should remain vigilant and informed about these potential changes.

data.title: Twenty One Capital Expands Bitcoin Holdings
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, Jack Mallers, CEO of Twenty One Capital, clarified in a recent CNBC interview that the company is not a Bitcoin treasury firm. Instead, it is a Bitcoin-native company supported by Tether and SoftBank, focusing on cash flow, growth, and Bitcoin accumulation.

Mallers also revealed Twenty One Capital's on-chain holdings, showing that the company has recently increased its Bitcoin holdings by 441.25 BTC, bringing the total to 43,514.12 BTC.

data.title: Bubblemaps questions the fair issuance of PEPE, suggesting that 30% of the genesis tokens may belong to the same entity.
data.description: Blockchain data visualization platform Bubblemaps published an article pointing out issues with the fair issuance of the Meme coin project PEPE. Monitoring showed that approximately 30% of the genesis PEPE supply was tied to a single entity, which sold $2 million worth of tokens the day after issuance. The analysis suggests that tokens with most of their supply concentrated in a few wallets can help investors detect scams such as "runaway" schemes, where insiders remove liquidity or conduct large-scale sell-offs, causing a price crash and leaving investors with worthless tokens. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Belarus has blocked residents from accessing cryptocurrency exchanges such as Bybit, Bitget, and OKX.
data.description: Belarus has blocked access to at least three major cryptocurrency exchanges: Bybit, Bitget, and OKX. No specific reason has been given for this move. Reportedly, when Belarusian users attempt to access these websites, they receive a message stating, "Access to this information resource is restricted according to a decision by the Belarusian Ministry of Information." (DLNews)

data.title: Coinbase: Regular non-paying users will no longer receive USDC deposit rewards.
data.description: Coinbase notified users via email that starting December 15th, only paid subscribers to Coinbase One will continue to receive approximately 3.5% annualized USDC rewards. Regular non-paid users will no longer receive USDC deposit rewards. Previously, Coinbase offered rewards ranging from approximately 2% to 3.5% for USDC in different regions; this program was funded by the exchange itself to encourage users to hold USDC on the platform. (DL News)

data.title: Revolut has partnered with Trust Wallet to launch a cryptocurrency buying service in the European market, initially supporting BTC, ETH, and other cryptocurrencies.
data.description: Revolut and Binance's Trust Wallet announced a partnership today to provide European users with a more convenient cryptocurrency purchasing experience. This integration allows users to purchase cryptocurrencies via RevolutPay, debit/credit cards, or bank transfers and deposit them directly into their self-custodied wallets, bypassing centralized exchanges. Initially, it supports five crypto assets: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, USDC, and USDT, with zero transaction fees available in some cases. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Analysis: Bitcoin fell after the Fed's rate cut; a "Christmas rally" is unlikely.
data.description: Bitcoin prices fell back to $90,000 after the Federal Reserve announced a 25-basis-point interest rate cut and gave cautious guidance. The Fed hinted at only one rate cut in 2026 and announced it would purchase $40 billion in Treasury bills next month to maintain ample reserves. Analysts said Powell's comments injected "new uncertainty," leading to weak market confidence and diminishing the positive demand for ETFs. Coin Bureau co-founder Nic Puckrin stated that while the rate cut wasn't as hawkish as some had expected, the numerous dissenting voices and the Fed's decision to only cut rates once next year injected new uncertainty into risk assets, thus insufficient to trigger a Christmas rally in Bitcoin. (The Block)

data.title: China's Financial Associations Issue Warning Against Virtual Currency and RWA Token Activities
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, seven financial industry associations in China have jointly issued a risk warning, explicitly prohibiting domestic participation in virtual currency and Real World Asset (RWA) token issuance and trading activities. Following this regulatory stance, mainland companies have seen a significant cooling in their RWA business ventures in Hong Kong. Industry insiders report a dramatic drop of over 90% in consultation inquiries, with many ongoing projects being asked to pause. Consequently, related concept stocks have experienced a decline, with companies like Langxin Group and GCL Energy Technology seeing their stock values halved from recent highs. In response, some enterprises are now exploring Real Data Asset (RDA) as an alternative direction.
